scripts.build: npm run -w @bms/shared build && npm run -w @bms/backend build && npm run -w @bms/frontend build
scripts.build:backend: npm run -w @bms/shared build && npm run -w @bms/backend build
scripts.build:frontend: npm run -w @bms/shared build && npm run -w @bms/frontend build
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @bms/shared typecheck && npm run -w @bms/backend typecheck && npm run -w @bms/frontend typecheck
